chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 114 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.26. 2. For orders on CMA No.840/2022. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA No.841/2022. 24.03.2026 Mr. Muhammad Tahir Khalil Dogar, advocate for the applicant. Pursuant to order dated 19.03.2026 learned counsel upon instructions submits that reference application may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
